description_long: A black, round ramen bowl with a red geometric pattern encircling its exterior holds a generous serving of ramen. The bowl is filled with golden broth, partially concealing a bed of yellow noodles. Toppings include two slices of braised pork, a halved soft-boiled egg with a bright orange yolk, green onions, narutomaki (fish cake with a pink swirl), and sheets of green seaweed arranged upright. Two wooden chopsticks rest across the top, supported by a vertical stick, adding a dynamic element to the presentation. The overall appearance is vibrant and inviting, with a harmonious arrangement of colors and textures.
description: A black bowl with red patterns contains ramen with noodles, pork, egg, seaweed, and garnishes, topped with wooden chopsticks. The presentation is colorful and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the upright seaweed sheets and a clear view of the halved egg and pork slices, with chopsticks resting across the bowl.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the depth of the bowl and the arrangement of toppings, with the chopsticks' support stick more visible.
description_view_2: The view shows the narutomaki and green onions more prominently, with the chopsticks extending to the left.
description_view_3: This perspective provides a balanced look at the egg, pork, and seaweed, with the chopsticks angled upward.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is round with a deep, gently sloping profile and a wide rim. Its exterior is finished in matte black with a continuous red geometric pattern encircling the upper portion. The bowl appears to be made of ceramic, giving it a sturdy and refined look.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are neatly arranged with two slices of pork placed side by side, a halved egg positioned near the edge, and upright sheets of green seaweed at the back. Narutomaki and green onions are grouped together, creating a balanced and visually pleasing presentation.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are mostly submerged beneath the broth and toppings, with only a few strands visible near the surface. They are partially exposed around the edges of the bowl.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears slightly opaque and golden, suggesting a rich, hearty base. No large floating particles are visible, but there is a subtle sheen indicating some oil on the surface.
attribute_utensil_presence: A pair of wooden chopsticks is present, resting horizontally across the top of the bowl and supported by a vertical stick. No other utensils are visible.
